signature_pad v5.1.3
====================

Released: 2025-12-03
Source:   https://github.com/szimek/signature_pad/releases/tag/v5.1.3
Build:    dist/signature_pad.min.js (UMD bundle, modern browsers)
License:  MIT (see LICENSE)
Fetched:  2026-05-23 by claude-code via cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/signature_pad@5.1.3
SHA-256:  38c67ba2220b98426e8baa9ea81a4c3fcd092c21189d4e2237c8e8abaa39429f
Bytes:    14877

Pinned for supply-chain hygiene per the usmcmin.com booking-site security
posture: third-party JS is NOT hot-linked from a CDN; it's vendored, version-
locked, and integrity-tracked here.

To upgrade
----------
1. Fetch the new dist/signature_pad.min.js from a tagged release.
2. Verify the SHA against the GitHub release artifacts if available.
3. Replace signature_pad.min.js + LICENSE in this directory.
4. Update the pin version, fetched date, and SHA-256 above.
5. Bump the cache-busting query string on the <script src> tag in
   /house-rules.html (e.g. ?v=5.1.3 → ?v=5.2.0).
